metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore the principles of marketing and promotional strategies, analyzing the marketing mix, consumer behaviour, and campaign development. This course emphasizes digital marketing techniques and practical application in contemporary business environments.
metadata.general_description: An applied course exploring marketing strategy, consumer behaviour, promotional campaigns, and digital marketing practices.

big_ideas.statement: Understanding consumer behaviour and market segmentation enables targeted and effective marketing strategies.
big_ideas.elaboration: By analyzing how consumers make decisions and identifying distinct market segments, businesses can develop more relevant and persuasive marketing messages.

big_ideas.statement: The marketing mix—product, price, place, and promotion—must work together to create a coherent market position.
big_ideas.elaboration: Strategic decisions in each element of the mix influence customer perception and purchasing behaviour in interconnected ways.

big_ideas.statement: Digital platforms and social media have fundamentally transformed how businesses communicate with and reach customers.
big_ideas.elaboration: Modern marketing requires proficiency in digital channels, data analytics, and content creation to remain competitive and relevant.

big_ideas.statement: Ethical marketing practices build trust and long-term customer relationships while respecting consumer rights.
big_ideas.elaboration: Responsible marketing that is truthful, transparent, and respectful of diversity and privacy creates sustainable competitive advantage.

competencies.raw: Design market research strategies to understand target audiences and market conditions
i_can_statements: I can develop research questions and methodologies appropriate for marketing decisions
I can design consumer surveys and focus group protocols
I can analyze market trends and competitive landscapes
I can segment markets and identify distinct target audiences

competencies.raw: Create promotional campaigns that integrate multiple channels and messaging strategies
i_can_statements: I can develop integrated marketing communications plans
I can design promotional campaigns for specific target markets
I can create consistent messaging across multiple promotional channels
I can develop campaign timelines, budgets, and evaluation metrics

competencies.raw: Develop marketing strategies that align with business objectives and market opportunities
i_can_statements: I can analyze business goals and design strategies to achieve them
I can position products or services within competitive markets
I can develop pricing strategies based on value, competition, and demand
I can design distribution and placement strategies for target markets

competencies.raw: Evaluate marketing effectiveness and recommend strategic improvements
i_can_statements: I can establish key performance indicators for marketing campaigns
I can analyze campaign results and calculate return on investment
I can assess market response to promotional activities
I can recommend refinements based on performance data and market feedback

competencies.raw: Conduct market research and analyze consumer behaviour data
i_can_statements: I can administer surveys and collect marketing research data
I can interpret quantitative and qualitative research findings
I can identify consumer motivations, attitudes, and purchasing patterns
I can create consumer personas and buyer journey maps

competencies.raw: Develop and execute promotional materials and campaigns
i_can_statements: I can write effective advertising copy and headlines
I can create visual promotional materials and layouts
I can produce promotional content for print and digital media
I can plan and coordinate promotional activities and events

competencies.raw: Apply digital marketing strategies and manage social media presence
i_can_statements: I can develop and implement social media marketing strategies
I can create engaging social media content and manage accounts
I can understand digital advertising platforms and campaign targeting
I can analyze digital analytics and optimize online campaigns

competencies.raw: Manage marketing budgets and resources effectively
i_can_statements: I can develop marketing budgets aligned with campaign objectives
I can allocate resources across promotional channels
I can track marketing expenses and expenditures
I can make resource decisions based on performance analysis

competencies.raw: Use digital marketing tools and platforms to reach and engage audiences
i_can_statements: I can navigate and manage social media platforms strategically
I can use email marketing platforms for customer communication
I can leverage digital advertising platforms and campaign management tools
I can integrate marketing technologies for coordinated campaigns

competencies.raw: Apply data analytics tools to measure and improve marketing performance
i_can_statements: I can use analytics platforms to track campaign performance
I can interpret web analytics and user behaviour data
I can create dashboards and reports for marketing metrics
I can use data to optimize targeting, messaging, and content

competencies.raw: Design and create digital marketing content using appropriate tools
i_can_statements: I can use design software to create promotional graphics
I can produce video content for marketing purposes
I can develop marketing websites and landing pages
I can optimize content for search engines and digital platforms

competencies.raw: Evaluate emerging marketing technologies and their applications
i_can_statements: I can assess new digital marketing tools for business effectiveness
I can understand automation and AI in personalized marketing
I can evaluate mobile marketing and app-based strategies
I can identify ethical and privacy considerations in digital marketing

areas.name: Consumer Behaviour and Market Research
topics: Consumer decision-making processes and influencing factors
Psychological and sociological aspects of consumer behaviour
Market segmentation and target audience identification
Qualitative and quantitative research methodologies
Competitive analysis and market trend identification
Consumer personas, journey mapping, and buying patterns

areas.name: The Marketing Mix and Strategy
topics: Product development, positioning, and lifecycle management
Pricing strategies: cost-plus, value-based, and competitive pricing
Place (distribution) channels and retail strategies
Promotional mix: advertising, public relations, sales promotion, direct marketing
Integrated marketing communications and consistent messaging
Brand development and positioning in competitive markets

areas.name: Promotional Campaigns and Communications
topics: Campaign planning and objective setting
Advertising copy and creative development
Visual design principles in promotional materials
Event marketing and experiential promotion
Public relations and media relations strategies
Sales promotion tactics: discounts, contests, loyalty programs

areas.name: Digital Marketing and Social Media
topics: Social media strategy and platform selection
Content creation and engagement strategies
Digital advertising: display, search, social media ads
Email marketing and customer relationship management
Web analytics and digital performance metrics
SEO, SEM, and online visibility strategies
